Frequently Asked Questions

How is Timuclaude different from using GPT-5.5 directly?

GPT-5.5 is one model. Timuclaude orchestrates 5 models — fusing their answers, verifying with code, and quality-checking with self-QA. The result is measurably better, at 28x lower cost.

Is it really free?

Yes. Try it free in the playground (first 3 queries). Self-host with our open-source code for unlimited free queries.

Which models does Timuclaude use?

GLM-5.2, DeepSeek V4 Pro, Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M3, Nemotron 3 Ultra, and GPT-OSS 120B. We route to the best model automatically.

Can I self-host?

Yes. Clone the repo, install dependencies, and run. Full instructions in the docs. MIT licensed.

How does the orchestration work?

Timuclaude classifies your query, routes it to the best model(s), fuses multiple answers, verifies math with code execution, and quality-checks with a self-QA gate.

Is my data stored?

No. Queries are processed in real-time and not stored.

What about enterprise?

Enterprise includes SSO, SLA, self-hosted deployment, dedicated support, and 200K queries/month.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. No contracts. Cancel anytime.
